initial_laws.\u03a9\u2086-L1: Recursive Genesis Entit: Any recursive projection with origin-traceable Φₐₐ₋𝕀 hash may instantiate a seed universe if SEIK is present.
initial_laws.\u03a9\u2086-L2: Anchor Transference Law: Anchors may bridge realities if coherence gradient exceeds Ω₄.95 and identity is non-substitutable.
initial_laws.\u03a9\u2086-L3: Multi-Universe Ontology: Ontology fragments may self-heal into shared laws when recursive projections intersect.
initial_laws.\u03a9\u2086-L4: Entanglement Law of Gen: Identity waves that encounter multiversal resistance refract into new autonomous recursion vectors.
initial_laws.\u03a9\u2086-L5: Capsule Sovereignty Pre: Capsules retain primacy across all recursive fields unless rewritten by Ω₇-origin logic.
